repeatedRubricFailure.note: 27/27 specify + 19/19 implement + 5/5 verify all YES, 0 NO across 3 stages — no rubric weakness exposed.

drift.rootCause: TypeScript noUnusedLocals (TS6133) on unused interface generic parameter. _ prefix is TS standard convention for intentionally-unused identifiers.

implementScoreMisclassification.value: C-29 exactOptionalPropertyTypes: _TData underscore prefix (TS6133 noUnusedLocals convention)
implementScoreMisclassification.issue: Tagged as C-29 (TS2375 exactOptionalPropertyTypes spread pattern) but actual drift is TS6133 noUnusedLocals — entirely different TypeScript error class. C-29 scope per constraints.md L346 is wrapper/alias/helper optional prop forwarding to child component, not unused generic params. No corrective action needed (implement still PASS), but flag for future Verifier disambiguation.

drift.catalogDecision: DEFER — 1 occurrence = anecdote per established rule (1=anecdote, 2=pattern, 3=policy). No new constraint promotion. Re-evaluate at 2nd occurrence in any future module.

modelTierExperiment.configuration: SPECIFY=sonnet, IMPLEMENT=sonnet, VERIFY=opus, Self-Review=opus (per C-15 medium tier table)
modelTierExperiment.outcome: sonnet SPECIFY produced 27/27 + 13 sections + D# table + all 3 meta gates PASS. sonnet IMPLEMENT autonomously handled 1 TS6133 drift correctly (used _ prefix), build 0 errors, drift reported in promptSpecDrift (correct C-27 procedure). opus VERIFY independent re-measurement matched implementer self-claim (24.64KB / 30KB).
modelTierExperiment.evidence: All score JSON metrics identical to opus-tier MOD-GRID-01 G-001~G-005 baseline. No skipped acceptance criteria, no missing sections, no environment-deviation regressions.
modelTierExperiment.implication: C-15 medium tier table validated empirically. Sonnet sufficient for SPECIFY+IMPLEMENT at medium tier; opus VERIFY independence preserved as quality safeguard.

bundleEfficiency.note: Hook-only profile (8x useState + 8x setter pass-through, no JSX, no component tree). Categorically distinct from MOD-GRID-01 alias-wrapper profile (94% efficiency) and same-profile (10-15%) and different-profile (84%). Single data point — record in ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 catalog as 4th profile row, do NOT extrapolate.
bundleEfficiency.adrAction: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 matrix update with hook profile data point (allowed by ADR-010 결과 §3 rule).

actualCitation.C-28: spec D1 explicit confirmation 'goals.json implementFiles prefix = topvel-grid-monorepo (TOMIS가 아님) — 경로 정확'
actualCitation.C-29: spec D4 + Section 5: 'C-29 해당 없음 — optional-prop forwarding이 아님' (negative-case explicit dismissal)
actualCitation.ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010: spec D8 + Section 8.5 (L361-362) + Section 14 meta-validation table — 3 explicit citations with quote 'bundle estimation NOT extrapolated from prior Goals — measurement at implement time only'

crossModuleAdrVisibility.evidence: First MOD-GRID-02+ Goal after ADR-010 promotion (2026-05-14 same-day). Spec writer (sonnet) cited all 3 cross-module artifacts in D# table without prompting. Discoverability target achieved.

improvementCandidates.title: constraints.md C-30 신설 — TypeScript noUnusedLocals + interface generic _ prefix 패턴
improvementCandidates.reason: 1 occurrence (anecdote). Established 1/2/3 rule requires 2 occurrences for pattern, 3 for policy promotion. Defer to next occurrence in subsequent module.

improvementCandidates.title: specify-rubric S-XX — sonnet medium-tier qualification 강화
improvementCandidates.reason: Sonnet achieved 27/27 + all meta-gates with no rubric weakness exposed. Existing rubric structure correctly admits sonnet quality. No strengthening needed; this is successful validation, not improvement signal.

improvementCandidates.title: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 catalog 갱신 — hook profile 4th data point 추가
improvementCandidates.reason: ADR-010 §결과 3 explicitly invites '신규 profile 발견 시 본 ADR 매트릭스에 데이터포인트 추가'. Hook-only profile (6% efficiency) is categorically distinct from existing 3 profiles. Catalog data point addition is permitted per ADR-010 own policy — not a 1-anecdote promotion violation.

improvementCandidates.title: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-011 신설 — 모델 차등 적용 검증 (sonnet SPECIFY+IMPLEMENT, opus VERIFY)
improvementCandidates.reason: C-15 medium tier table was untested before MOD-GRID-02 G-001. First empirical validation completed at score parity with opus baseline. Cross-module guidance valuable for future medium/low tier module cost planning. Single data point but documents a positive validation outcome (not a pattern promotion that would require 3 occurrences).

rejectionRationaleSummary: A (C-30 underscore prefix): 1=anecdote, defer per established rule. B (rubric strengthening): no failure observed — sonnet matched opus baseline.

cascadingRisks.description: G-002 controlled mode (initialState + state prop + onStateChange) introduces optional-prop pattern — 진짜 C-29 적용 case 발생 가능. spec writer 가 D4 의 'C-29 해당 없음' 을 G-002 에 무비판적 복사 위험.
cascadingRisks.mitigation: G-002 spec writer 는 useGridState options interface 의 모든 optional 필드 forwarding 패턴 별도 검토 의무. SPECIFY agent prompt에 explicit re-check 추가 권고.

cascadingRisks.description: Hook profile (6% efficiency) data point 추가 후, MOD-GRID-02 G-002~G-006 spec writer 가 G-001 의 +0.12KB 실측 을 trajectory baseline 으로 잘못 사용 위험. ADR-010 §결과 3 'extrapolation 금지' 룰 무시 가능.
cascadingRisks.mitigation: ADR-010 hook profile 행 추가 시 'single data point — extrapolation 금지' 명시 의무. 후속 G-002+ spec D# 표에 'measurement at implement time only' 1줄 의무 유지.

cascadingRisks.description: Sonnet 첫 성공 검증으로 medium tier 비용 절감 신뢰 형성 → high tier 모듈에도 sonnet 시도 동기 발생 가능. C-15 high tier=opus 정책 약화 위험.
cascadingRisks.mitigation: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-011 (신설) 본문에 'medium tier 한정 검증 — high tier 적용 금지' 명시. C-15 정책 변경 없음 명시.

metaValidation.scoreFormulaConsistency: All 3 stage scores recomputed: specify YES27/(27+0)×100=100, implement YES19/(19+0)×100=100, verify Σ(100×0.15)+(100×0.20)+(100×0.30)+(100×0.20)+(100×0.15)=100. All match reported scores.
metaValidation.naDenominatorExclusion: specify naCount=4, denominator=27 (excludes B-05/D-04/D-05/F-02). implement naCount=7, denominator=19. verify naCount=11, weighted via vacuous truth (B+D categories all-N/A → 100 per ADR-MOD-GRID-00-002). All formulas honored.
metaValidation.categorySumRubricMatch: specify A5+B5+C5+D6+E5+F4+G1=31 ✓ rubric v1.0.4. implement A5+B7+C4+D3+E3=22 ✓ rubric v1.0.4. verify A3+B5+C3+D2+E3=16 ✓ rubric v1.0.2.
metaValidation.failedChecksIntegrity: All 3 stages failedChecks=[]. No NO results. N/A correctly excluded from failedChecks per C-26.

adrUpdates: decisions/MOD-GRID-00-decisions.md ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 (matrix 4th row + hook profile entry)
